{{Infobox character
| name = The Mad King
| aliases = the Mad King
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|gaze can see across time and space}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Mad King]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, [[Executor]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Abidan]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Executor]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Blackflame (novel)|Blackflame]]
}}

''See also: [[The Mad King Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Mad King]] is a powerful [[Vroshir]] and former [[Executor]] who serves as a significant antagonist to the [[Abidan]]. A legendary conqueror and innovator, he is characterized by his ruthless nature toward enemies and his devotion to his people. He resides in a citadel located on the [[fortress]]-world of [[Tal’gullour]], which he loves deeply. The King is a formidable combatant who wields both a dark [[The Scythe{{!}}Scythe]] and a bone [[sword]] that resonates with the sorrow of destroyed worlds. His power is so immense that his mere presence can shatter minds, leading him to live in self-sealed chambers to prevent accidental mass casualties within his [[Iteration]]. His primary motivation is the [[destruction]] of the [[Abidan]], a goal he pursues by testing their response times and foresight through calculated strikes. He has even managed to create a [[veil]] that hides his existence from [[Way{{!}}the Way]], making him a Class One threat. Despite his immense strength, he hosts a dangerous entity that has previously killed [[Judges]] and struggles to maintain control over it. His physical condition is marked by scarred [[madra channels]] and a weakened lifeline, yet he has managed to retain his mental faculties unlike others who suffer from similar afflictions. He is known for spreading chaos through specialized viruses and utilizing subordinates to undermine the foundations of the heavens.}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Mad King]] hosts an entity that has killed [[Judges]] before.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Mad King]] hates the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Mad King]] wields a [[The Scythe{{!}}Scythe]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Mad King]]'s eyes are like two red suns.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Mad King]]'s gaze can see across time and space.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Mad King]]'s presence is a memory, recording, or imprint left on [[Way{{!}}the Way]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Mad King]] clashed swords with [[Razael]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Mad King]] left barriers and obstacles in [[Way{{!}}the Way]] and sealed off a [[Sector]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1">''Waybound'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Mad King]] was a former [[Executor]] recruited by the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Mad King]] wore bone armor and had red eyes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
